Disposables such as gloves, masks, under pads, EZ bath, gauze, Tegaderm, ortho roll, dressing pads, HME filter, hand rub, Dettol, mouthwash, splints, drapes, and thermometers are not covered by insurance and must be borne by the patient. Hospital Services such as food and beverages, medical records, drug administration charges, ward consumables, vital-monitoring consumables, ambulance services, CD/DVD charges, attendant stay, registration fees, and cosmetic accessories are also not covered and must be paid at the time of discharge. Investigations and Procedures not covered under insurance include (but are not limited to): – Blood grouping/clotting tests – Viral screening (HIV, HCV, HBsAg, HPA, HPSAg, etc.) – Thyroid profile (TSH, T3, T4) for non-diabetic patients - Investigations advised during cross-consultations - GRBS tests - Lipid profile - IVF procedures - Dental procedures - Cosmetic procedures - Treatment for viral-positive cases - Unrelated investigations – Vaccinations and sterilization charges. Room eligibility is generally calculated as a percentage of the sum insured - 1% for ward rooms and 2% for ICU. If you wish to upgrade your room, the additional room charges and all related expenses will be payable by the patient, as per the insurance policy terms. On final bill 30% to 40%. For cash paying patients, an advance of 80% of the total estimated amount shall be paid at the time of admission by Cash / Card. All cash paying patients shall maintain a positive cash balance at any time during their stay for treatment in the hospital. Excess Amount paid (up to Rs 10,000) will be refunded to you in cash immediately at the time of final bill clearance. Refunds of amounts more than Rs. 10,000 will be transferred by NEFT within 7 business days. As per section 269 ST, amount upto Rs 1,99,999 only will be accepted by cash. Payments greater than this amount can be done through NEFT / DD / Credit Card / Debit Card.
